segments.text: You see, so many Sahaja Yogis coming here during the Christmas puja.
Christianity has spread all over the world and there are
So-called Christians who say they follow Christ
I don't know from which angle
Christ was the embodiment of Paramchaitanya, He was Aumkara ,He was Shri Ganesha and those
who follow Him have to be very different people.
But always happens in every religion that they go at random into opposite direction
completely opposite. The essence of Christ's life was detachment and sacrifice
For a person who is detached, there´s nothing like sacrifice
He sees his live as just drama
Such great personality came on this earth
And created the so called Christian religion
which has gone into wars, all kinds of hypocritical thing and now the people are discovering about
it. He stood for truth! And fissures don't know what is the truth is? The truth
is that you are the Spirit and You have to become The Spirit.
He's one who has talked about second birth of realization,
but they've forgotten what he said
–what They're to achieve!
It such a funny thing
all these great people came on this earth
and created a proper religion for our ascent,
And I don't know how people have become so stupid
with the teachings of this so-called their masters.
It's all money oriented apart from that
it is not standing on truth
I think this is the second crucifixion of these religions, there's no religion which
following really their principles as being described.
i don't know how they manage to twist truth in a manner just make some money or
some fuss. Such a ritualistic stuff is going on in the name of Christ, though they have
faltered so many times and there had experience such bad influence from the world to reaction
we don't know why? Such round about things come up
and people accept it, they just accept.
You take any religion these days Islam is talking I don't know of what
there are two important things in the life
Of Mohammed Sahaja. The first one
Is called as mirage
which nothing but awakening of Kundalini absolutely clearly
And second he has talked about Jihad
Jihad means killing your bad things, killing you're bad nature.
Killing all the Shadripus within it doesn't mean that to become a Muslim and kill yourself
is stupid thing today did You became Musalman just
to kill yourself and commit suicide, calling it as a ritual they are saying that by this
you will go to Jannat into the heavens.
How can You?
As Muslims we're not religious – Not at all!
And then by killing these sinful people how would We do Go through the Heavens
will have enjoyment of Jnana. There's no reasoning, but all these Maulanas first
offal has finished their education to Kriyadhar and they do not educate themselves at
All so there are No idea in this world where are they studying what is
Some few are educated, but they're also lost with the idea of having power on these people.
It's such a shameful thing to do in God and in the name or spirituality!
Now our duty is tell them what it that truth?
Our duty is bring them to the proper path of spirituality because they are all lost.
Christians have been lost, Muslims were lost and Hindus had also been lost – all
these people have no idea as what their religion professed or what they're supposed
to do, ultimately Christ was crucified.
So you can see how when there were truth and untruth tried finish it off they couldn't
bear them we have example of Socrates what is the need kill him but he killed Him in
In this way, so far we know in the past all people who are pivotal for truth have been
finished because they don't want that truth.
They're following some religion as it can give power over other people – a religion
Mirage is a kundalini awakening and they say that mirage will never take place, very good.
So many of you have got realization – your vibrations are cool breeze which is described
in Quran but who can tell the Muslims?
You talk something they'll come and cut your throat, that's all.
We will go to Jihad."
It is such a stupid thing their doing
And in these modern times as we see
people have crossed all the Mariyadas
All things of religion
When I went America
They were surprised how
They have forgotten of morality, they've no sense of morality and their selling it
in the market making money out. On contrary these Muslims specially there is a class called
Wahhabis this people are saying that women aren't the one who spoil your morality
and so hide them, they should be covered.
Any woman who was wearing white chappals in Afghanistan
They were beating her, killed Her
And So many people In India especially North
have taken to Islamic culture
but the really ill treat women
I was married in the north and know how they have been unkind to women.
So North of India is already contaminated by these people, and South is contaminated
by the fanatic Hindus, all kinds of rituals, worst type, bestowed upon only on women are
followed in south.
They will shave head off a woman make her go round a temple pour water and she is
just tumbling around. She's not walking, but they go on putting water
over her – I've seen it man! We have Sati is of the killing
women after death their husband. This something no one can understand
why put all dharma in a woman and why not on men? But
And one thing could be that Hindu religion has now become so much out of date,
That you can correct all these things. So many have been corrected in my own life time
I was surprised how they do it but any Muslims and Islamists
You cannot correct such horrible things
They are doing to their women
And whenever you try to help them, it's impossible.
For example I started a place for the women who are left out in world alone
Who have orphans and children
Most of these people were Muslims
They had 8-10 children each
So now we need orphanage
This is what they produce from their religion
You can see this around
Even Hindus have a funny system of widowhood, if they make women widows it's terrible.
And there are poor things some them or quite lot of then living in Vrindavan
I was told that the get one rupee per day and what do They sing bhajans
In one rupee, how can we live in this country?
They are good at creating so many beggars and beggar women.
If that is the religion better not have it!
We've had enough of these all kinds
ritualism through this Brahmanism
which Brahmins absolutely good for nothing
those who try to teach religion
have to be
something of a great level.
So in Sahaja Yoga you give up everything because this is all nothing
but
mud and in the mud will be finished
You had tell people about it
What are they going?
They have misused their religion for
All kinds of bad things like
In England if somebody dies
They must have champagne, when they go for the burial
then you must have champagne. How is it that they are going to have champagne
and how out of religion all their priests also drink?
One priest came to Sahaja Yoga I was very happy
but he said,"I'll come to sahaj but i will not give up drinking."
I said, why?
Because it's written in the Bible that you must incus-cha.
How could Christ say that he should ring?
He was not only a Realizer himself but he was realization Himself!
They said,"He has said It."
Whatever You may Say, He Has Said It.
Where?
said he went to one wedding. In that wedding, He made wine for the people. I say did not!
.He went there and in such a short time ,he just put his hand into water
And it started tasting like grape juice
and grape juice are the same word wine in Hebrew language.
I said, ''I can do that.''
That doesn't mean
i like people to drink
Who could say such a nonsense?
It is awareness which important
Chetana
it's important
And if you spoil your awareness
how can be so juicy
It was impossible to tell them that you cannot drink, but drinking even in India has become
very common.
This is all against Christianity it's against Hinduism and against Islam
And though its written down in Quran don't drink they take
They are ordering instead of following the religion
And they have become the greatest sinner.
Is that what Christ wanted them to do?
You've got be pure people, nirmala tattvam you must have –that's
What it is also I told a story about Shri Vahana who met Christ in Kashmir and he asked
Christ About His name and his country He says
I come from a country where people are malich, malich means those who have desire for muller
or filth.
So he told him why don't you go and teach them nirmala tatvam, Shalivanasana?
That is what nirmala tattva you've got which purifies your, which cleanses you
which gives you joy, happiness and the truth.
This is what we should ask for otherwise it's all darkness
You don't see light whether you are Christian Hindu Muslim anyone
–you cannot see Light of Truth
And have to take the Light of Truth
But after that
What do I have?
You have to give it others, you have to transform others.
We've worked very hard for It and sometimes I'm surprised how people who are doing such a good work
Are so humble And So Good! How Have They Achieved It?
Of course there are some who money oriented, power-oriented but these things do not give
joy.
What gives you is your inner light of truth which all have as we know and experienced
But I would say this experience has to be given to others, it's not only for you.
Given as many people possible but how may do that?
How maybe we have also sick community they came to serve and said we cannot worship
Goddess.
I said, why?
Because Shri Guru Nanak has talked about the Goddess, the Devi.
The first sentence of his book is Adya – adyaya is the Adi Shakti and for this if the Sikhs
stupidly say that Why do they have a Chandigarh they are so stupid also nothing to really
compare it.
Now you have to understand, have You given up all that nonsense or not in your life?
Or are All of you sticking on the same.
That is very important as long
As you're sticking onto those things there will be a problem
Sahaja Yoga does so much I was surprised
In America they had 300 sahajogis nothing happened
Somewhere on the tower, somewhere in a street all of them were there and nothing has happened
to it.
Some have said that somebody told us inside, they've run away and we started running
into other direction some where delayed I don't know how these three hundreds such
Such a devil of these people who are thinking of destroying the whole world, or coming around.
This is why I went to America and told them that this war will be over before Diwali
and it ended . Before Diwali ,this war would have been over
And It Ended ! What a stupid thing they can destroy the creation
of God like this? Who are they, how have got the right to destroy
The world but that is what a human nonsense. Christ came on
This earth he worked for long time and He was to be
Crucified so we got crucified but crucifixion
Is not our glory Our glory is His resurrection
that he was resurrected, no doubt.
To say it is not possible and all of them who are you to say?
What do we know about spirituality what can happen for a person who is spiritually equipped
What can work out if whatever we know about human beings,
We try to draw conclusions which are all wrong.
See in your life there're so many miracles
In the lives of Sahaja Yogis and they
I told somebody that you better compile them
So he said within one month
All those letters have come upto my head
in one month. I said forget it, don't. It's not 1 or 2 from all over the world people
are writing but those who were intellectuals of very difficult is impossible to put this
into their heads so whatever possible we have do our maximum
Put our attention to people who want it.
Now in India,
It has gone into jails
,it's have go into schools and everywhere
And somebody told me the other day
that even a Catholic Church
they had started taking to Sahaja Yoga
I don't know what is wrong
with their heads or how they are managed
But thats How Sahaja yoga is spreading
But it has to spread much more.
You have, all of you individually should go round and work it out –and talk about
It!
But Sahaja Yogis are little shy once I was going by plane one lady very-very hot so
i asked her what guru she follows She told me the name
I was surprised that she didn't know anything about spirituality and these people have huge
houses, big temples everything.
And She telling Me the praise of Her guru –I thought She is very shameless-She hasn
t got any thing in her , She s so hot and She's talking a lot but Sahaja Yogis won
I was surprised why Sahaja Yogis don't talk about it.
But the other day,
had gone with somebody in a market
and i had a sahajogi with him
And he started telling them
About me
He started giving them realization
They were very happy about
Everywhere you go
You have neighbors
Go to markets
Every where
you should go and talk about, like they sing carols.
We also have bhajans to tell other people we have to tell them why are so shy?
The shyness is not going help Sahaja Yoga.
So please see that if try give realizations others
You will have powers ,have faith in yourself
I think there lack of faith or whatever it
very few people who come out and do it. Italy I have seen, also Austria, Australia, Sahaja
Yoga has spread a lot because of their conviction that we had to give others what
We have to share it from the life of Christ.
One has understand his sacrifice, so such a lot of sacrifices to be crucified like
that with thieves but he did not in same way when all people want do sahaja yoga work
you shouldn't think what will happen my grandfather?
what will happen to my grandmother, I mean whatever letters i get all about this.
It's very fun they are only worried some relations
They're not worried the relation of world you have
Worried for wife or children
I can't only letters like these
Nobody writes that we've given realization so many
They never write how they have been able to achieve spreading of Sahaja Yoga.
No one writes, very surprising!
You've got tell me I hope you all people understand the importance or spreading Sahajyoga
if don't do that your absolutely useless
The greatest thing for me, as you have so many lights here we should
have many more Sahaja Yogis all over the world.
If You want to change this world and if You
want avoid all trials and tribulations of
useless light they are leading
You have to save them, you've got to salvage that's your job.
That is what we are paying for Sahaja Yoga not
For yourself don't get worried about yourself if
If read the letters I will get disgusted all kind of
Letters i'll get that they want to marry
All right there many girls who claim
that we have been applying for four years,
We couldn't get married.
First you must know
out of proportion women are there
they're very good
so if their 40 boys
There would be at least 120 or maybe 150 girls
So now who should marry those girls?
Just think off it
but the write letters of complaint
That we've applied 4 times
We can't, we cant help it.
So you go outside marry anywhere where feel like or else wait and see and dedicate your
life to Sahaja Yoga its a very difficult thing when they gone complaining that I should
be married but I haven got married as well . Marriage was never our idea ,but then
We had to allow marriages and now it has become the main issue with everyone.
Either they are not married, if their marriage is not happy
If there divorce then must be married again
All sorts of things complications for which I am not prepared
Sahaja Yoga was not for that
If your marriage isn't successful its'not my job
And this goes on we'll have stop marriages
I don't want you to write all these things, it shows how poor we are in Sahaja Yoga.
Why not try and tell me that many people have given realization?
That would make Me happy instead of complaining about your wife – that's what my concern
is as It came We've married You if You cannot carry on It's sure to do and this
This is what, it's the snack of Sahaja Yoga.
In every religious movement there have been so many wrong things
Why in sahaja yoga I think marriage is a very big hurdle
Moreover boys don't come because
India are easy to marry boys
You can also get money this that
But girls they're five times more than the boy
Boys don't want to marry, they'll have their own marriages though there are Swanyogas.
So I can understand why in Swanyoga also after coming into Realization, to them marriage
is a very important issue what's most important that how many people you give realization
That is your life, if a lotus there it will open but it must give fragrance even the lotus
has responsibility then what about you?
I am not saying that you get crucified like Christ no.
As soon as enjoy them and have peace stability balance but at same time you have to spread
This is what, it's your job now.
Your Job Is not important only this is important how many people you give Realization . It
very difficult because they have made a mess of all the great incarnations ,all those
great Sufis and saints but at least few People don't do that so please try to
You have to spread out and next time I hope, I hear from you how many people you gave Realization.
That is the greatest justification for the crucifixion of Christ ,for His birth . For
his coming on this earth is Agnya.
And if they give Realization then they've crossed Agna, they're gone beyond and
are in Sahasrara. So,in Sahaja Yoga you understand everything it's very easy to
understand. Sahaj yoga is the simplest thing
but after realization so
You have go round and see how many people
can give realization? Everything
Is alright all your worshipping
Your puja is alright what
What is most important in it, how many people you have given realization.
I would like to know that especially with ladies – ladies are rather weak at giving
realization they can do a lot and after all i am also woman but somehow find the ladies
in Sahaja Yoga are not of a level, they can do a lot and lot but somehow
They don't understand the importance their life.
You know very important how many people there who have got realization
There were so many Sufis
Who've gotten realization that they write poetry finished
There were so many saints who did, wrote and so much things.
In India we had a lot of saints they wrote all these things people will read them but
nothing happens you have the art to give realization
You know about Kundalini
You know all about it. Go ahead and talk to people. I was alone
When i started sahaja yogana
And am a woman so what, About you that's an out challenge for all of them
How many People have we made sahaja yogas
Even in your family People are not sahajyoga means Your daughter is not your son Is not
So What'S the use of singing Glory To Christ?
If you are singing glory to Him, You must make people cross their archaic.
He is so highly placed within us but we have never respected him that such a highly-placed
personality you've crossed over So why not others?
Let's see from todays puja how much determination your heart.
You should know that a goddess doesn't come with your own demands.
She comes on her own, she has Her Own timing but if you are people in majority who have
really become saints and making others saintly then I am for it otherwise i'm available
to Your, You can my vibrations ,You Can My Poojas all these things are permitted
No doubt, but for that you are only capable, you're only entitled
to do Sahaja Yoga.
If your spreading Sahaj yoga if your giving to others then
Only You will be considered really capable of receiving the
vibrations from the Goddess in some countries it is so much
Why not?
With your country, with you neighborhood ,with your friends which relations is possible.
So to die we have decide that are going dedicate yourself in giving it others its very joy
given and talking about Sahaja Yoga may God bless you.
